personalStatement:
I design and deploy end-to-end ML pipelines, translating research insight into robust engineering systems.

 I'm drawn to interdisciplinary, generalizable, and novel problems. I work best in environments that balance collaboration with ownership.

Right now, I’m building agentic and multimodal AI.
education: Bachelor of Computer Science - University of Waterloo
mlSkills:

Exploratory Data Analysis
Feature Engineering

Time Series

employment.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: End-to-end development of foundational Variational Autoencoder model for contextual driving scene understanding
Validation of embedding quality through custom evaluation metrics, dimensionality reduction and clustering techniques
Custom MobileNetV2-UNet as a spatially-preserving, lightweight alternative to the VAE encoder
Secured buy-in for research pivot towards both semantic scene understanding and scene graph representation learning

employment.title: Machine Learning Scientist
bullets: Robust physiological signal processing algorithm from driver-facing videos with Fourier analysis and filtering
Gaussian Mixture Models and audio source separation transfer learning for signal decomposition
Evaluation of PulseGAN for signal denoising and heart rate extraction

employment.title: Data Scientist
bullets: ETL pipeline for extracting, cleaning, and validating 100+ GB of proprietary manufacturing data
Predictive time-series modelling of Indentation Force Deflection (IFD) data to reduce 7-minute QA tests to 30 seconds
Statistical Process Control Model integrated into the Woodbrige Data Estate

employment.employer: Faculty of Engineering, University of Waterloo
employment.title: Robotics Vision Engineer
bullets: Development of data labelling / augmentation GUI and tooling for training YOLO on underwater mission data
Ground up design and implementation of Aquadrone robot vision pipeline in ROS2

employment.employer: Digital Assets Group, University of Waterloo
employment.title: Software Developer
bullets: In-house animation classes and documentation on top of open-source Manim library

extracurricular.title: Robotics Software Engineer
bullets: Bash tooling to standardize & automate ROS2 package scaﬀolding
Kalman filter in C++ for robot localization
